arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher reveals the one area Man City need to 'rebuild' after falling to five defeats in a row - as he likens their current struggles to a previous issue faced by title rivals
arts.sum: City were humbled at home as they lost 4-0 against Tottenham, with James Maddison netting a brace and Pedro Porro and Brennan Johnson also scoring in the rout.

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester City vs. Feyenoord injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Manchester City and Feyenoord.

arts.ttl: Man United and Man City handed major final Premier League final standing verdicts
arts.sum: A final Premier League table has been predicted along with the overall positions for both Manchester United and Manchester City

arts.ttl: Man City duo return to training ahead of Feyenoord clash amid absence of key man
arts.sum: Manchester City welcome two first-team stars back to training ahead of a Champions League match with Feyenoord, however a key player was absent from Monday's session.

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Feyenoord: Why "a shot in the arm would be most appreciated" by Pep Guardiola in "must-win" Champions League test
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney explains why Tuesday's Champions League encounter with Feyenoord at the Etihad Stadium is "a must-win for many reasons" for Pep Guardiola's side.

arts.ttl: Chaos, crisis talks and calm - inside Man City camp after five defeats
arts.sum: Manchester City are looking to end a run of five straight defeats in all competitions when they take on Feyenoord in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne: Can "true captain" ease Man City's problems after "brilliant" Tottenham cameo
arts.sum: Man City stars including Phil Foden, Bernardo Silva and Erling Haaland do not have the same impact on a team as "true captains" Kevin De Bruyne, Rodri or Ruben Dias, Citizens expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Haaland AT FAULT for Man City woes? Guardiola reveals the truth
arts.sum: It is also the first time that Man City have lost five games in a row for 18 years, but Guardiola has refused to blame Haaland for the club’s dismal run of results. Pep Guardiola has insisted that Erling Haaland isn’t the reason behind Manchester City ’s worrying recent form.
